Android.Oreo, 11 hours agoWhy not 6.4 quad curved screen? There's no curved display phones with 6.3 screen so we ne... moreCurved screens have gone out of fashion in China for the moment. They were all the rage and brands tried to convince consumers that curved screens are more premium for many years.  However, when brands switched almost entirely to straight screens they were extolling the benefits of straight screens.  Marketing really sucks!  There are rumours that Apple will use curved screens at least in some products in the future. If that does happen then you'll see curved screens come back into fashion and you'll probably get numerous smallish androids with curved screens. Until that happens though I think almost all the upcoming phones will use flat screens.  Personally I far prefer the flat screens but I see your point about the lack of variety.  3-4 years ago flat screens were hard to find in flagship phones but it's gone full circle.
Why not 6.4 quad curved screen? There's no curved display phones with 6.3 screen so we need options.
